Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: chairs by form [300037775], chairs (furniture forms) [300037772], single seating furniture [300037771], seating furniture [300037769], furniture by form or function [300048628], furniture [300037680], furnishings by form or function [300037342], furnishings (works) [300037336], Furnishings (hierarchy name) [300037335], Furnishings and Equipment (hierarchy name) [300264551], Objects Facet [300264092]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Armchairs with an upholstered frame and projecting wings for protection against drafts.
Sillones con un marco tapizado y alas salientes hacia afuera para protección contra corrientes de aire.
Leunstoelen met een gestoffeerd frame en uitstekende oren voor bescherming tegen tocht.
椅框裝有軟墊，且椅背具有可擋風之延伸側翼的扶手椅。
Armlehnstuhl mit gepolstertem Gestell und hervorstehenden Ohrenbacken zum Schutz vor Zugluft.

Source.Source_ID: 2000011251/Edwards and Macquoid, Dictionary of English Furniture, 2d ed. (1983)
